title: Test: Add OpenTelemetry observability testing
original_text: Added observability testing with OpenTelemetry. Implemented distributed tracing. Added metrics collection and export. Implemented log correlation with traces. Added observability dashboards. Result: observability testing operational.
expected_subject: test(observability): add observability testing with OpenTelemetry
expected_command: git commit -m "test(observability): add observability testing with OpenTelemetry"
